nav.comingSoon: “{name}” is coming in the next update.

step1.title: Paste Message or URL
step1.messagePlaceholder: Paste any message, question, news, comment, email or conversation here — or fetch context from a URL above.
step1.attachHint: Upload or just paste (Ctrl+V) a screenshot — Instagram / Facebook / X posts work great

generate.dailyLimitStatus: Daily free limit reached. Please top up to generate more replies.

empty.title: Your AI replies will appear here
empty.desc: Paste your message, select options and click “Generate AI Replies” to get started.
empty.tipDesc: Be specific with your message for better results.
empty.quickStartDesc: Paste → Select Styles → Generate → Copy your favorite replies

toast.welcomeBonus: 🎉 Welcome! You have received {n} free AI replies.
toast.couldNotReachServer: Could not reach the server for sign-in.
toast.dailyLimitReached: Daily free limit reached. Top up to generate more.

errors.pasteMessageOrImage: Paste a message or attach an image first.
errors.selectStyle: Select at least one reply style.
errors.onlyLeftOne: You have only {left} free reply left today. Please select {left} or fewer replies, or top up.
errors.onlyLeftMany: You have only {left} free replies left today. Please select {left} or fewer replies, or top up.
errors.networkErrorGenerate: Network error — is the server running?
errors.pasteUrl: Paste a YouTube or Instagram URL first.
errors.couldNotFetchAutoManual: Could not fetch automatically — paste the details manually.
errors.couldNotReadImage: Could not read that image. Try another file.

footer.text: AI-generated suggestions — review before posting. The engine is instructed not to invent facts; always verify claims yourself.
